'''salodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ngram|ngram]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ngram|ngram]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| salodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæledeth|sæledeth]] || [[word:sæledej|sæledej]] || [[word:sæledesh|sæledesh]] || [[word:sælede|sælede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:salolodoth|salolodoth]] || [[word:salolodoj|salolodoj]] || [[word:salolodosh|salolodosh]] || [[word:salolodo|salolodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:salodoth|salodoth]] || [[word:salodoj|salodoj]] || [[word:salodosh|salodosh]] || [[word:salodo|salodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:salofdoth|salofdoth]] || [[word:salofdoj|salofdoj]] || [[word:salofdosh|salofdosh]] || [[word:salofdof|salofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:salodotho|salodotho]] || [[word:salodojo|salodojo]] || [[word:salodosho|salodosho]] || [[word:salodoko|salodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:salodoth|salodoth]] || [[word:salodoj|salodoj]] || [[word:salodosh|salodosh]] || [[word:salodo|salodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:salodothol|salodothol]] || [[word:salodojol|salodojol]] || [[word:salodoshol|salodoshol]] || [[word:salodokol|salodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:salodothotho|salodothotho]] || [[word:salodojojo|salodojojo]] || [[word:salodoshosho|salodoshosho]] || [[word:salodoko|salodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:salodothon|salodothon]] || [[word:salodojon|salodojon]] || [[word:salodoshon|salodoshon]] || [[word:salodokon|salodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:salodothoro|salodothoro]] || [[word:salodojoro|salodojoro]] || [[word:salodoshoro|salodoshoro]] || [[word:salodokoro|salodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
